explanations.label: AMENITY DENSITY
explanations.sentence: 2,280 amenity density (1,850 restaurants + 380 cafes + 50 schools). excellent — Top 10% of GTA neighborhoods (p10=113, p90=1,852). adds 17.5 of 18.0 possible points to your total.

explanations.label: TRANSIT ACCESS
explanations.sentence: 1,160 transit access (620 bus stops + 540 stations). excellent — Top 10% of GTA neighborhoods (p10=2, p90=539). adds 18.0 of 18.0 possible points to your total.

explanations.label: FOOD ACCESS
explanations.sentence: 140 food access (140 grocery stores). below average — bottom half of GTA neighborhoods (p10=38, p90=325). adds 5.0 of 14.0 possible points to your total.

explanations.label: GREEN SPACE
explanations.sentence: 60 green space (60 parks). about average for the GTA (p10=5, p90=143). adds 4.0 of 10.0 possible points to your total.

explanations.label: DEVELOPMENT
explanations.sentence: 80 development (52 recent permits + 28 construction sites). excellent — Top 10% of GTA neighborhoods (p10=0, p90=27). adds 10.0 of 10.0 possible points to your total.

explanations.label: CIVIC
explanations.sentence: 380 civic (380 civic sites). excellent — Top 25% of GTA neighborhoods (p10=60, p90=467). adds 5.9 of 7.5 possible points to your total.

explanations.label: CULTURE
explanations.sentence: 90 culture (90 cultural venues). excellent — Top 10% of GTA neighborhoods (p10=1, p90=46). adds 7.5 of 7.5 possible points to your total.

explanations.label: RECREATION
explanations.sentence: 110 recreation (110 rec sites). minimal coverage for this area (p10=63, p90=343). adds 1.3 of 7.5 possible points to your total.

explanations.label: SERVICES
explanations.sentence: 1,100 services (1,100 service businesses). excellent — Top 10% of GTA neighborhoods (p10=84, p90=772). adds 7.5 of 7.5 possible points to your total.
